item.title: About Me
item.description:
I am a software engineer and cybersecurity researcher focusing on Red Team operations, Cloud automation, and Backend development.

My approach is not just about breaking into systems, but understanding their architectural foundations. I translate complex technical vulnerabilities into quantifiable business risks and design automated solutions to mitigate them.

What I Build

I specialize in designing high-performance tools and reverse-engineering processes. My recent focus areas include:

  • Offensive Tooling & CTI: Building ultra-fast search engines to parse and extract credentials from stealer logs (analyzing threat actors’ ULPs).
  • Architecture & Backend: Implementing robust software design patterns (Factory, Builder, Prototype) to create modular systems. I recently engineered precision data extraction and classification engines for financial statements via OCR, debugging complex JSON parsing logic in production environments.
  • Cloud & Infrastructure: Managing and automating Cloud environments, operating directly from the terminal with Vim to maximize deployment speed and efficiency.

The Vision

My long-term goal is the convergence of these disciplines: engineering AI-driven automated defense testing and penetration frameworks designed to secure both on-premise infrastructures and Active Directory environments.

item.title: Password Search: breaking down a Stealer
